project_description: Email migration (25k mailboxes) from Lotus Notes 9 to Microsoft 365 Exchange Online. Email migration (5 years archive), contacts, calendars, Lotus Notes applications (15 databases) → SharePoint + Power Apps, DNS cutover, MX configuration, DKIM/DMARC, user training.
client_history: Lotus Notes since 1996 — client never had cloud.
risk_patterns: Lotus Notes databases often contain hidden business processes — inventory critical.
pm_comment: Inventoried 47 Notes databases instead of planned 15 — each is a separate scope.
